title: Luffy Takes on Mohji and Richie
description: On pages 17–19, Luffy confronts Mohji and Richie after their intimidation exposes the cruelty of Buggy’s pirates.
scene: Mohji and Richie try to use fear and force, but Luffy’s reaction turns the scene into a direct challenge against their bullying.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, man. Whatcha doing?! Swimming's your spe- cialty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the? What's going on, shanks?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So I... ate a one hundred million bell worth fruit... and became unable to swim!! And I also missed the treasure lying on the seabed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh... so shanks saved your life

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm not talking about that part!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Because of that idiot my future life plans were post- poned for ten years!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So that's why I promised myself!! If I can't get anything under the sea then I'd settle for every treasure above it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Because of that who ever touches my treasure...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: My nose is way too big!

summary: This part pushes Luffy from casual involvement into righteous anger, especially when innocent people and loyal companions are hurt.
